headline: Trade Desk Makes Peace With Publicis Over Ad-Tech Fees – Retail Says This May Be A Turning Point
summary: According to a report by Ad Age, Publicis has resumed recommending the ad technology company’s services to its clients.

headline: New England’s Top Security Executives Named at the 2026 BostonCISO ORBIE Awards
summary: Leading CISOs honored for leadership, enterprise security, and business impact. BOSTON, June 12, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The 2026 BostonCISO ORBIE Awards honored leading chief information security officers (CISOs) from Omnicom Group, Bain & Company, Inc, Group1001, Cambridge Health Alliance, Flagship Pioneering, Babson College & Analog Devices, Inc. for their exceptional leadership.
